scope: evaluation-only precision closure of the frozen Q1 candidate whose sole failed check was supported-calibration reveal-order Monte Carlo standard error

decision_rule.pass: qualify the unchanged supported-IID oracle-composition assignment checkpoint and authorize a separately frozen p(N) Gate
decision_rule.fail: stop before p(N) and localize remaining likelihood-estimator or assignment failure without retraining or changing thresholds
decision_rule.boundary: This precision closure cannot qualify unseen-action or formula/prototype-disjoint assignment, generated composition, p(N), lattice, coordinates, joint generation, tensor conditioning, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
